languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, я лишь од{mf|ин|на} из многочисленных слуг династии, подоспевших вам на помощь".

traits.locale_text: "Я просто од{mf|ин|на} из многочисленных слуг династии, Лорд-капитан, подоспевших вам на помощь".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, я лишь од{mf|ин|на} из многочисленных слуг династии, подоспевших вам на помощь".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."
"Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."
"Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

languages.text: “舰长大人，我只是王朝众多前来相助的仆从之一而已。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我只是王朝众多前来相助的仆从之一而已。”

languages.text: « Seigneur-capitaine, je ne suis que l'{mf|un|une} des nombreux serviteurs de la dynastie venus à votre secours. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: « Seigneur-capitaine, je ne suis que l'{mf|un|une} des nombreux serviteurs de la dynastie venus à votre secours. »

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, ben yalnızca senin yardımına koşan hanedanlığın sayısız hizmetkârından biriyim."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, ben yalnızca senin yardımına koşan hanedanlığın sayısız hizmetkârından biriyim."

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, soy solo un{mf|o|a} de muchos sirvientes de la dinastía que vienen a ayudar».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, soy solo un{mf|o|a} de muchos sirvientes de la dinastía que vienen a ayudar».

languages.text: "Lord Captain, ich bin nur {mf|einer der vielen Diener|eine der vielen Dienerinnen} der Dynastie, die Euch zu Hilfe geeilt sind."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, ich bin nur {mf|einer der vielen Diener|eine der vielen Dienerinnen} der Dynastie, die Euch zu Hilfe geeilt sind."

languages.text: 「殿、私は王朝に仕える者の一人です。殿の助けに駆けつけたのです」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am but one of the many servants of the dynasty who have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: 「殿、私は王朝に仕える者の一人です。殿の助けに駆けつけたのです」
